inputs.label: Mass
inputs.businessContext: The mass of the object being subjected to force.

businessContext_i18n.en: The mass of the object being subjected to force.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Masse des Objekts, auf das die Kraft wirkt.

inputs.label: Initial Velocity
inputs.businessContext: The initial velocity of the object before the force is applied.

businessContext_i18n.en: The initial velocity of the object before the force is applied.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kuvvet uygulanmadan önce nesnenin ilk hızı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Anfangsgeschwindigkeit des Objekts vor Krafteinwirkung.

inputs.label: Final Velocity
inputs.businessContext: The final velocity of the object after the force is applied.

businessContext_i18n.en: The final velocity of the object after the force is applied.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kuvvet uygulandıktan sonra nesnenin son hızı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Endgeschwindigkeit des Objekts nach Krafteinwirkung.

inputs.label: Time
inputs.businessContext: The duration over which the force is applied to change the velocity.

businessContext_i18n.en: The duration over which the force is applied to change the velocity.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hızı değiştirmek için kuvvetin uygulandığı süre.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Dauer, über die die Kraft zur Geschwindigkeitsänderung wirkt.
